[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100001 2
1 10011010 4
2 10010110 4
3 01100011 4
4 01111111 7
5 00011111 5
6 10000110 3
7 01100010 3

23 32 00011111 5 match 5

70 07 10010010 3
